title: Rust Stack should default to SecureStack for E2E encryption
description:
VIOLATION of spec/06-security.md 8.7: Rust exports both Stack (plaintext) and SecureStack (OSCORE-protected) but integration tests and examples use Stack directly. OSCORE should be the default, not opt-in.

Current state:
- SecureStack exists and works (tested in secure_stack_oscore_roundtrip)
- Stack is used in integration tests without OSCORE
- Policy says 'Use OSCORE for all CoAP traffic'

FIX REQUIRED:
1. Make SecureStack the primary export / recommended path
2. Update integration tests to use SecureStack by default
3. Document when plaintext Stack is acceptable (if ever)

Files:
- rust/lichen-node/src/lib.rs
- rust/lichen-node/src/stack.rs (tests)
close_reason: Implemented: Made SecureStack the primary/recommended export with clear documentation that all CoAP traffic MUST use OSCORE (spec 8.7). Added PlaintextStack type alias with security warnings. Removed plaintext CoAP test; added security documentation explaining ICMPv6 does not require OSCORE per RFC 8613.
